subject: Fix: Download rebar3 bin rather than source
commit_message:
Fix: Download rebar3 bin rather than source

Packer builds have been broken due to the removal of the bootstrap
step. Instead of the more error-prone process of building from source,
we will instead download the bin directly (with steps based on those
already used for docker-compose).

Change-Id: Ie0d156a4608f413894dc3c2bde27c7f33ed02a1a
Issue-ID: CIMAN-33
Signed-off-by: Eric Ball <eball@linuxfoundation.org>
